package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpServerWithoutTimeouts() string {
    ruleID := "http_server_without_timeouts"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Explicit http.Server{} values that omit common timeout fields."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
